description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a distressed green and yellow paint finish, showing significant signs of rust and wear. The barrel is surrounded by a large, irregular greenish liquid spill, suggesting it may be leaking or has recently leaked. On one side, a prominent black biohazard symbol is visible, indicating the contents are hazardous or toxic. The surface of the barrel is ribbed with horizontal reinforcement rings, and there are no visible handles or lid. The paint is chipped and uneven, with streaks and patches of both green and yellow, giving it an aged, abandoned appearance. The overall look suggests it is used for industrial or hazardous waste storage, likely found in outdoor or neglected urban environments.
description: A weathered green and yellow metal barrel with a biohazard symbol and a large greenish spill, showing heavy wear and no lid or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the biohazard symbol, heavy rust, and the largest area of greenish liquid spill.
description_view_1: Rear view with more yellow paint, no visible markings, and a wide spread of the greenish spill.
description_view_2: Side view with mostly yellow surface, faint rust, and scattered greenish liquid spots.
description_view_3: Angled view showing part of the biohazard symbol and a moderate area of the greenish spill.
